zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Missenden於1339年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登時，她的父親Sir Thomas Missenden20歲，母親Isabella de Brocas19歲。她於1361年與Sir Thomas Giffard在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Missenden于1339年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Missenden20岁，母亲Isabella de Brocas19岁。她于1361年与Sir Thomas Giffard在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

nameMeanings.name: Missenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fishenden
meanings: English: locative name from the lost place-name Festinden in Hawkhurst (Kent), recorded as Festendenn about 1270.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Missenden was born in 1339, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Missenden, was 20 and her mother, Isabella de Brocas, was 19. She married Sir Thomas Giffard in 1361, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Missenden est née en 1339, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Missenden, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Brocas, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Giffard en 1361, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Missenden 1339 in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Missenden 20 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Brocas 19. Sie hat 1361 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Missenden è nata il nel 1339 nel Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Missenden, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Brocas, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Giffard nel 1361, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Missendenが1339年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Missendenは20歳，母Isabella de Brocasは19歳であった。1361年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでSir Thomas Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Missenden(이)가 1339년 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Missenden(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Brocas(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Sir Thomas Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Missenden родилась в 1339 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Missenden было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Brocas, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Giffard в 1361 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия.
